name: quadruped-trot
title: Trot gait for a 12-DoF quadruped
summary: A central-pattern-generator trot: diagonal leg pairs oscillate in phase, the other pair in antiphase, producing a rhythmic joint-target stream. Proves the contract spans LEGGED morphologies — same negotiation and safety envelope, a many-joint periodic policy.

post: a periodic, phase-correct gait (diagonal pairs synchronized)
no per-tick step exceeded the cap
